description_long: This object is a retro-style computer monitor reminiscent of the original Apple Macintosh, featuring a boxy, off-white plastic exterior with a large, dark display area dominating the front. The front panel includes a small rectangular slot, likely for a floppy disk, and a subtle gold accent in the lower left corner. The left and right sides are plain, with the left side showing a cable extending outward, possibly for a mouse or power connection. The rear panel displays two colored geometric shapes, one red and one green, arranged in a blocky, pixel-art style, adding a decorative touch. The monitor sits on a slightly protruding base, and a matching rectangular mouse is attached by a black cable. The overall design is minimalist, with sharp edges and a utilitarian aesthetic typical of early personal computers.
description: A retro, boxy computer monitor with a large dark screen, off-white casing, and a decorative rear panel featuring colored geometric shapes. Includes a matching mouse connected by a black cable.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large dark screen, a floppy disk slot, a gold accent, and the attached mouse.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the plain casing, the black cable extending outward, and the mouse.
description_view_2: Rear view features two colored geometric shapes (red and green) on the back panel, with minimal other details.
description_view_3: Right side view is mostly plain, showing the boxy shape and a hint of the rear panel's colored shapes.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, flat, and made of light gray plastic, with sharp corners and no visible texture or decorative elements. It frames the display area with a utilitarian, retro aesthetic.
attribute_stand_type: The monitor sits on a simple, slightly protruding flat base integrated into the main body, made of the same plastic material, with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: A single button is visible on the lower right front panel, adjacent to the floppy disk slot, separated from other features.
attribute_brand_logo: A small gold accent is present on the lower left front panel, but no explicit brand logo is visible.
